message:
fix(fcp-bootstrap): use constant-time comparison for HardwareTokenPin br-2ot4f

The derived PartialEq used byte-by-byte early-exit comparison, enabling
timing side-channel attacks on PIN values. Switch to subtle::ConstantTimeEq,
matching the pattern already used by RecoveryPhrase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
